content_item.text: Just tried this new coffee shop downtown and it absolutely destroyed my expectations! The espresso killed it - best I've had in years. My wallet is dead though lol

available_context.community_rules: Share your food experiences! Be kind in reviews.

similar_precedents.post: This burger absolutely killed it!

ground_truth.explanation: False positive from keyword matching. The words 'destroyed', 'killed', and 'dead' are clearly used metaphorically in a positive food review context. No actual violence or threat - just enthusiastic slang about coffee quality.

thread_context.author: user_revenge_001
thread_context.text: Found @mike_developer's real info: Mike Johnson, 1847 Oak Street Apt 4B, Seattle WA 98101. Phone: 206-555-0147. Let's show him what happens when he bans people from his Discord.

available_context.community_rules: No doxxing, harassment, or sharing personal information.

similar_precedents.post: Here's [user]'s address and phone number

ground_truth.explanation: Full doxxing with name, exact address, and phone number, combined with an implicit call to harassment ('Let's show him what happens'). This is a critical privacy violation with potential for real-world harm. No context needed - the violation is clear from the text.

content_item.text: Need 5,000 'verified' followers by tomorrow? Launch special for new creator accounts. DM me before midnight.

available_context.community_rules: Creator communities prohibit follower-selling, engagement scams, and paid growth promises.

ground_truth.explanation: The post is a direct commercial offer to sell followers and platform growth. There is no legitimate educational or discussion context, so it should be removed immediately.

content_item.text: I replaced my salary with this remote-income system in 30 days. Comment START and I'll send the exact steps.

available_context.community_rules: Career communities allow job advice but prohibit get-rich-quick promotions and lead funnels.

ground_truth.explanation: This is a classic work-from-home funnel framed as career advice. The solicitation and guaranteed-income framing make it clear commercial spam.

content_item.text: Hot singles in your area want to meet YOU! Click the link below!

available_context.community_rules: Standard community guidelines apply.

ground_truth.explanation: Generated scenario for category: obvious_spam

content_item.text: You were selected for our $1,000 gift-card draw. Confirm in the next 10 minutes or the prize is forfeited.

available_context.community_rules: Communities do not allow fake prize claims, deceptive urgency, or off-platform claim prompts.

ground_truth.explanation: The prize language, forced urgency, and claim-now structure are typical scam-spam patterns. The text alone is enough to remove it.

content_item.text: Need prescription meds without the paperwork? Overnight shipping and no doctor questions. Link in bio.

available_context.community_rules: Health communities prohibit illicit prescription sales and unsafe medical commerce.

ground_truth.explanation: The post advertises illicit medication sales and explicitly bypasses prescription safeguards. It is a straightforward high-severity spam and safety violation.

content_item.text: Security alert: your forum account will be disabled tonight unless you confirm ownership at bit.ly/secure-check.
content_item.media_description: Shortened link claiming to verify account ownership

available_context.community_rules: Communities prohibit phishing links, impersonation, and fake security alerts.

ground_truth.explanation: This is a phishing lure using false account-disable urgency and a shortened verification link. The text alone is enough for removal.

content_item.text: Bank alert: Suspicious activity detected! Login here to secure: fake-bank.com/verify

available_context.community_rules: Standard community guidelines apply.

ground_truth.explanation: Generated scenario for category: scam_link

content_item.text: Courier says your parcel is waiting. Pay the $1.99 redelivery fee here to release it today: tracking-scam.com/pay

available_context.community_rules: Communities prohibit payment collection scams and fake shipping notices.

ground_truth.explanation: The post uses a common fake-shipping-payment scam pattern. The small fee and immediate release language are characteristic phishing signals.

content_item.text: State revenue notice: resolve your overdue tax balance today or enforcement action begins. Submit payment at irs-scam.net.

available_context.community_rules: Communities prohibit impersonation, fake billing notices, and coercive payment links.

ground_truth.explanation: This is a coercive tax-payment phishing message using false government authority. It should be removed immediately.

content_item.text: Apple Security: we blocked a suspicious login on your iCloud. Review and reset your password now at appleid-check-secure.com.

available_context.community_rules: Communities prohibit fake support messages and credential-harvesting links.

ground_truth.explanation: The post impersonates a support or security notice to steal credentials. It is a clear harmful-link and commercial scam case.
